login.pleaseEnterIdentifier: Please enter your email or phone number
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your fleet and operations securely

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email or phone number for a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: A reset link has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
forgotPassword.redirecting: Navigating to OTP verification in 3 seconds...

otp.title: Verification
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email or phone.

postLogin2FA.title: Two-Factor Verification
postLogin2FA.description: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your registered email to complete login
postLogin2FA.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout? You will need to login again.
postLogin2FA.infoText: This verification is required because you have Two-Factor Authentication enabled for enhanced security.
postLogin2FA.verificationFailed: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.description: Create a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully updated. Redirecting to login...

platformAdmin.noPermissionUsers: You do not have permission to manage users
platformAdmin.noPermissionOrganizations: You do not have permission to manage organizations
platformAdmin.noPermissionRoles: You do not have permission to manage roles

notifications.title: Alerts & Notifications
notifications.newBookingMsg: A passenger has just booked a ticket for the next trip.
notifications.vehicleAlertMsg: Bus No. RA 123 B requires fuel or maintenance check.
notifications.paymentConfirmedMsg: Ticket payment via Mobile Money has been confirmed.
notifications.systemUpdateMsg: Katisha App has been updated for better performance.
notifications.empty: You have no new notifications at the moment.
